Cru High School · Launch Weeks

Reach Teens
With Cru For
Spring Break

Join us for a life-changing mission experience reaching high school students during our Launch Weeks! Today’s teens are facing unprecedented mental, spiritual, and identity crises — but these pressures also create spiritual openness, making teens the most responsive age group to the gospel. During a Launch Week, you’ll experience sharing the gospel and your personal story with teenagers on or near campus — many of whom have never heard it.

Choose your trip

San Diego, CA March 14–19 View this trip → Tampa, FL March 14–19 View this trip → Orlando, FL March 21–28 View this trip →

Tap a location to see full details and register on that trip’s page. Registration opens Oct 1, 2026 · space is limited.

Develop Yourself

  • Develop leadership skills
  • Build deep relationships
  • Enjoy the local scene
  • Grow in your faith

Experience Ministry

  • Hands-on evangelism with teens
  • Learn to share your story
  • Gain confidence to live out Jesus’ mission on any campus

Make a Difference

  • Help launch new movements on high school campuses
  • Help a student connect with Jesus
  • Shine the light of Jesus in a dark place
Cost: Free
  • Just get there and we’ll house and feed you
